testcase.name: test_pdf_file_accessible

failure.message: AssertionError: Test PDF not accessible: 400 assert 400 == 200 + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pdf_parse_individual_questions.py:52: in test_pdf_file_accessible assert response.status_code == 200, f"Test PDF not accessible: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Test PDF not accessible: 400 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_response_includes_extracted_text_preview

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: ('Connection aborted.', RemoteDisconnected('Remote end closed connection without response'))

testcase.failure:
